name: The Kiley Group, Inc.
summary: The Kiley Group, Inc. provides management consulting services to companies, assisting with going to a public market and raising capital funding. It also engages in buying royalty and licensing rights to oil/gas and software. The company was formerly known as MP2 Technologies, Inc. and changed its name to The Kiley Group, Inc. in October 2009. The Kiley Group, Inc. was founded in 1997 and is based in New York, New York.
